---
title: "Preperation of a scientific project"
id: material-gis-reproducible-research-expose
order: 304
summary: "For scientific practice it is useful to document and communicate the chosen approach transparently and comprehensibly."
source_url: "https://gisma-courses.github.io/LV-uav-workflow/morea/gis-reproducible-research/scientific_expose.pdf"
modules:
  - gis-reproducible-research
Goals: []
activities: []
assessments: []
labels:
  - basic
  - mandatory
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/gis-reproducible-research/material-gis-reproducible-research-expose.md"
---

Read the project preparation guide:

- [Scientific expose PDF](../images/gis-reproducible-research/scientific_expose.pdf)
- [Original source URL](https://gisma-courses.github.io/LV-uav-workflow/morea/gis-reproducible-research/scientific_expose.pdf)

## Connected Module

- [Reproducible Research](../modules/gis-reproducible-research.qmd)
